name: Butterscotch Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (325°F for glass pan). In a medium microwave-safe bowl, melt butterscotch chips and margarine. Stir in graham cracker crumbs and nuts. Press half of the mixture (2+ cups) firmly into the bottom of a greased 13 x 9 inches baking pan. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Beat in condensed milk, vanilla, and egg. Mix well. Pour into prepared pan. Top with remaining crumbs. Bake for 25-30 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean. Cool to room temperature. Chill before cutting into bars. Refrigerate leftovers.
